research.goalTemplate: Research {what}. Read README.md and any upstream source files needed. Capture raw notes for a structured brief. IMPORTANT: write your notes to the single file ./notes.md at the root of your working directory — exactly that path, not a subdirectory and not a different filename.

execute.goalTemplate: Produce the structured research brief for {what}. Read ./notes.md and upstream sources. IMPORTANT: write the brief to the single file ./brief.json at the root of your working directory — exactly that path, not a subdirectory and not a different filename. brief.json shape: {"findings":[{"claim":string,"source_event_id":string}],"sources":[string]}. Each finding's claim must be substantive and carry a source_event_id traceable to evidence.

review.goalTemplate: Review {what}. Read ./notes.md and ./brief.json. IMPORTANT: write your review to the single file ./review.md at the root of your working directory — exactly that path, not a subdirectory and not a different filename. Note whether each claim is sourced and whether the brief is fit to accept.
